introSection: Jubilé is a steel roller coaster located at Selva Mágica in Guadalajara, Jalisco, Mexico. It was built by Pinfari.

sections.title: Plopsaland De Panne
sections.content: Jubilé first opened in 1995 at Plopsaland De Panne in Adinkerke-De Panne, West Flanders, Flemish Region, Belgium. It was painted red with white supports. In 2000, as it was deemed too "extreme" for the park's new focus on younger visitors, it was dismantled.

sections.title: Selva Mágica
sections.content: It opened again in July 2000 at Selva Mágica. The ride was repainted blue with white supports. The ride was removed during sometime before or during the 2025 operating season.

fullText:
Jubilé is a steel roller coaster located at Selva Mágica in Guadalajara, Jalisco, Mexico. It was built by Pinfari.



Jubilé first opened in 1995 at Plopsaland De Panne in Adinkerke-De Panne, West Flanders, Flemish Region, Belgium. It was painted red with white supports. In 2000, as it was deemed too "extreme" for the park's new focus on younger visitors, it was dismantled.

It opened again in July 2000 at Selva Mágica. The ride was repainted blue with white supports. The ride was removed during sometime before or during the 2025 operating season.



The cars have over-the-shoulder restraints.
